title: Brother — Maxim
paragraphs:
I composed this for my Brother when I was about fifteen.
I cherish Him beyond measure, and He is a part of me. There is no soul on this earth closer to me than Him! He is the one who, it seems, would readily lay down His life for mine. And I hope I would do the very same for Him. Moreover, His support is never merely hypothetical. Max has held me up countless times when I was teetering on the edge of disaster — or perhaps even falling beyond it. Even when others would tell Him, "Let it go, Andryukha isn't worth this kind of devotion," He simply continued to carry me through it all.

We have lived side by side for the greater part of our lives. From the very moment of His birth until my departure for St. Petersburg. Then, an ocean of years together in Brest. Later, I came to Gdańsk specifically because He and His family were already living there. In Gdańsk, His family sustained me for over a year. They provided for me and kept me going during a time when depression left me literally unable to rise from my bed. And I genuinely could not. And ever since... the mere sensation of having my Brother nearby magnifies my strength a hundredfold.

To continue our poetic battles) So, after I delivered my ode, Max walked into the other room, only to return a couple of minutes later with his riposte:
У меня есть Брат - Андрей, если надо, уберёт.
